name: Utilizing Deep Learning AI to Analyze Scientific Models: Overcoming Challenges
venue: Journal of Science Education and Technology
summary: Study of CNN-based automated analysis of student scientific models that used general data augmentation and SMOTE to address imbalanced rubric categories in complex constructed scientific-model responses.
